communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

- All contracts, licenses, MOUs, MOAs, data agreements, letters of intent, State of Work documents, Scope of Work documents, and other agreement documents with Pen-Link LTD that were active any time between 1/1/2023 and 5/12/2026.
- All financial documents or records of financial transactions, exchanges or obligations related to Pen-Link LTD. Responsive materials include all invoices, bills, receipts, check stubs, or any other records, including those possessed in an electronic format.
- A copy of all training materials, including but not limited to any handouts, workbooks, assessments, presentations, slides, videos, audio files, or other materials, either developed in-house or provided to the agency pertaining to the agency's use of Pen-Link LTD products.
- A copy of all agency manuals either developed in-house or provided to the agency pertaining to the agency's use of Pen-Link LTD products.
- A copy of all agency policies and procedures either developed in-house or provided to the agency pertaining to the agency's use of Pen-Link LTD products.
- A roster of all agency employees who either have a user account for Pen-Link LTD products or have internal agency permissions to use Pen-Link LTD products as of 5/12/2026.
- A roster of all agency employees who have completed agency training for the use of Pen-Link LTD products as of 5/12/2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

e

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Records Request
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Specifically, I am requesting: 

All proposals and responses submitted by all vendors. 

All contracts, agreements, amendments, addenda, and pricing schedules resulting from this solicitation. 

All evaluation materials, including scoring sheets, evaluation committee notes or summaries, and recommendation memoranda. 

All bid tabulations, comparison matrices, or award justifications. 

All addenda to the solicitation, and any questions and answers (Q&A) or clarifications issued to vendors. 

Any other documentation or correspondence (including emails, letters, or internal memoranda) material to the evaluation, selection, and award of this stop-arm camera enforcement program. 

If any portion of the requested records is exempt from disclosure, please provide the non-exempt portions and cite the specific statutory basis for each withholding or redaction.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jon Smith

communications.subject: Re: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Records Request
communications.communication:
Good Afternoon, Mr. Smith:

All open records request for the Houston County Sheriff's Office needs to be directed to the following email: records@houstoncountyga.gov.

Please direct your request to the above email.

Thank You,

Kerrie George

Legal Assistant

County Attorney's Office

Houston County Board of Commissioners

200 Carl Vinson Parkway

Warner Robins, GA 31088

Phone: (478) 542-2012

Fax: (478) 542-2124

E-Mail: KGeorge@houstoncountyga.<mailto:KGeorge@houstoncountyga.org>gov


[cid:27281967-0219-47e9-b05a-ee3fbbecc711]

This message originates from the County Attorney’s Office of Houston County, Georgia. This e-mail message and all attachments may contain legally privileged and confidential information intended solely for the use of the addressee. If you are not the intended recipient, you should immediately stop reading this message and delete it from your system. Any unauthorized reading, distribution, copying or other use of this message or its attachments is strictly prohibited. All personal messages express solely the sender's views and not those of the County Attorney’s Office of Houston County, Georgia. This message may not be copied or distributed without this disclaimer. If you have received this message in error, please notify the sender immediately.

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Records Request
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Specifically, I am requesting: 

All winning proposals and responses submitted by all vendors. 

All existing contracts, agreements, amendments, addenda, and pricing schedules resulting from this solicitation. 

All evaluation materials, including scoring sheets, evaluation committee notes or summaries, and recommendation memoranda. 

All bid tabulations, comparison matrices, or award justifications. 

All addenda to the solicitation, and any questions and answers (Q&A) or clarifications issued to vendors. 

Any other documentation or correspondence (including emails, letters, or internal memoranda) material to the evaluation, selection, and award of this stop-arm camera enforcement program. 

If any portion of the requested records is exempt from disclosure, please provide the non-exempt portions and cite the specific statutory basis for each withholding or redaction.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jon Smith

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Specifically, I am requesting: 

All proposals and responses submitted by all vendors. 

All existing contracts, agreements, amendments, addenda, and pricing schedules resulting from this solicitation. 

All evaluation materials, including scoring sheets, evaluation committee notes or summaries, and recommendation memoranda. 

All bid tabulations, comparison matrices, or award justifications. 

All addenda to the solicitation, and any questions and answers (Q&A) or clarifications issued to vendors. 

Any other documentation or correspondence (including emails, letters, or internal memoranda) material to the evaluation, selection, and award of this stop-arm camera enforcement program. 

If any portion of the requested records is exempt from disclosure, please provide the non-exempt portions and cite the specific statutory basis for each withholding or redaction.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jon Smith
